steps.title: Spot the defining contrast
steps.content: ”While rearing by female-male pairs is most common, male-male pairs sometimes rear cygnets too, achieving a significantly higher rate of survival”—this contrast shows the family structure succeeds with multiple configurations, not just one.

steps.title: Match to the correct word
steps.content: ”Elasticity” captures this adaptive capacity—the ability to function effectively across different structural variations. Reciprocity (mutual giving), cohesion (unity), and affection (emotional warmth) don't address the flexibility being demonstrated. That matches choice A — A is correct.
